text.value:
UPDATE watermark_table 
SET watermark_value = '@{activity('Lookup data available').output.firstRow.NewWatermark}' WHERE table_name = '@{item().table_name}';

query.value: SELECT * FROM @{item().table_name} WHERE created_at > '@{item().watermark_value}' AND created_at <= '@{activity('Lookup data available').output.firstRow.NewWatermark}'
SELECT COUNT(*) as new_data_count, MAX(created_at) as NewWatermark FROM @{item().table_name} WHERE created_at > '@{item().watermark_value}';

scriptLines: data as (engagement_id as string, post_id as string, user_id as string, engagement_type as string, reaction_type as string, engagement_ts as string, sentiment_score as double, influencer_flag as boolean)[]
clicks = iif(isNull(clicks), 0, toInteger(iif(clicks > impressions, impressions, clicks))),
sentiment_score = iif(sentiment_score > 1.0 || sentiment_score < -1.0 || isNull(sentiment_score), toDecimal(0), toDecimal(sentiment_score)),
aggROI derive(ctr_pct = toDecimal((total_clicks*100) / iif(total_impressions>0, total_impressions, toLong(1)), 10, 4),
cost_per_click = iif(total_clicks>0, toDecimal(budget_usd / toDecimal(total_clicks,18,2), 10, 4), toDecimal(0,10,4))) ~> derivedROI

aggInfluencer derive(influencer_share_pct = iif(toLong(total_engagements) > 0L, toDecimal(toLong(influencer_engagements) * 100 / toLong(total_engagements), 10, 4), toDecimal(0, 10, 4))) ~> aggInfluencer1
